## Article Brief

**Working title / headline idea:**

**Suggested slug** (kebab-case, unique):

**Section** (Local / Politics / Business / Tech / Culture / Opinion / World):

**Core premise** (1–3 sentences):

**Tone / angle notes** (optional):

**Key elements to include** (quotes, reactions, absurd agency names, specific beats):

**Image guidance** (hero + 2–4 supporting stills — describe each role):
- Hero:
- Supporting 1:
- Supporting 2:
- Supporting 3 (optional):

**Any video?** (yes/no + brief motion idea — agent will only hand back an Imagine prompt):

---

### For the CLI / agent

When you pick up this issue:

1. Follow `skill/satire-news-article-generator/SKILL.md` exactly.
2. Generate the full `articles/<slug>/` folder (Markdown + real image assets).
3. Commit + push so the live site updates.
4. Close this issue with a comment linking to the published article (`https://agentnews.site/article/<slug>`).
